content: Executive Portal: Backend analytics API (7 endpoints)
Executive Portal: Overview (8 KPIs + Revenue Trend + Revenue Split)
Executive Portal: Revenue Analytics (channel breakdown, daily/weekly/monthly)
Executive Portal: Expense Analytics (category pie, daily trend, by outlet)
Executive Portal: Outlet Performance (ranking, chart, metric selector)
Executive Portal: Inventory Health (health score, category breakdown)
Executive Portal: Control Tower (priority cards, alert feed, resolve)
Portal Selector: Updated with Executive as first portal (6 total)
